ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the meeting record */,
  "prime_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the prime sponsor of the meeting */,
  "meeting_details" TEXT /* Details about the meeting */,
  "multimedia" TEXT /* Path to any multimedia associated with the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the meeting */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the meeting (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee associated with the meeting */,
  "agenda_path" TEXT /* Path to the agenda document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action taken */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting where the action was recorded */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or committee that took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details regarding the action taken */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee associated with the action */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes */,
  "vote_results" TEXT /* Detailed vote results (e.g., 5-4 in favor) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's purpose */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson of the committee */,
  "meeting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of meetings (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the sponsor */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the sponsor is associated with */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the result means */,
  "vote_threshold" INTEGER /* Number of votes required for the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action detail */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action this detail refers to */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action detail was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_minutes" (
  "minute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minute record */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the minutes belong to */,
  "minute_text" TEXT /* Text of the meeting minutes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the minutes were uploaded */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the minutes */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the minutes were approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("minute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_minutes_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., council member, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., public, staff, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting related to the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification is scheduled for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, pending) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the document is associated with */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., agenda, minutes) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media record */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting associated with the media */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., video, audio) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media was uploaded */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the media file */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)
